display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies the project as CloudFlare's PKI toolkit; source_facts.name: cfssl.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official CFSSL site; source_facts.repo is the official Cloudflare repository with README and doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Cloudflare PKI toolkit.
